Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Reda Messaoudi vs. Luiz Rocha

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Mike Davis
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Mike Davis
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Mike Davis

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Mike Davis
Fighter Profile: Mike Davis
Fighter Profile: Mike Davis

HKFC 21 - Derek Parker v. Lloyd Valley
HKFC 21 - Derek Parker v. Lloyd Valley

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 48 continues with more action packed MMA! We kick off this show with a great amateur fight between Dale Tallman and Chris Smeltzer. Following is the Main event of the evening, a professional Light Heavyweight Title Fight between UFC Veteran Rodney Wallace and TUF finalist Dan Spohn. You are in for five rounds of MMA action, so do not miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 3

Finish of the Day - Dalgiev Khamzat v. Dragan Pesic - M-1 Challenge
Finish of the Day - Dalgiev Khamzat v. Dragan Pesic - M-1 Challenge

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 48 continues with some of the best fights in MMA! Mitch Carlson is welcomed back to HK cage by John "" The Dragon"" Nguyen in the amateur matchup of the night. Following are pros TJ Laramie, who prefers taking the fight standing, vs. Yvon ""Black Mamba"" Agenord, with a strong Jiu Jitsu background. This episode is rounded out by an entertaining pro contest between two MMA heavyweight veterans: Lee Mein vs. Lloyd Marshbanks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4
Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4
Fight Vault - HK48 - Episode 4

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Addy Pallit.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit
Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit
Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring John Woo
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: John Woo
Video.title: Fighter Profile: John Woo

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: John Woo
Fighter Profile: John Woo
Fighter Profile: John Woo
